description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Wheel that builds Python wheels for Linux, macOS, and Windows. Trigger on push events to branches and tags, excluding versioned branches and tags for OCIO <= 1.x.x. For each platform, set up Python, install dependencies, build wheels using cibuildwheel, and upload the resulting wheels as artifacts. Additionally, create a job to upload the collected wheels to PyPI when a tag is pushed.
